response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple domains, including developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD infrastructure, with clear evidence of hands-on coding and open-source contributions — but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond informal mentorship and workshops, and his leadership roles are not clearly defined as formal team management.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools and test automation frameworks (e.g., Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and cross-team infrastructure work (CI/CD, GitLab, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong hands-on coding across mobile, web, and embedded systems with exposure to mobile platforms via iOS app development
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management experience beyond technical leadership
Lacks explicit experience in organizational change or roadmap planning at scale
Mobile platform expertise is limited to one iOS project without evidence of broader ecosystem impact
